forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KXTFTPY5BCXGN9MFXFFSJQHA
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '9280'
+title: 'Auto-compaction opt-in: makeSession(budget:compactionPrompt:) + retry-once'
+---
+THE harness-collapse centerpiece (harness plan ┬¦5, absorbed): the session that manages its own window. makeSession gains optional budget: TokenBudget and compactionPrompt: CompactionPrompt; when budget is set the session checks measured fill >= budget.trigger at turn start (ALSO DEPENDS ON ^1peq9n7 TokenBudget/contextFill ŌĆö add when tooling permits multi-ref) and folds via its own compact() (swap internal, id stable, CompactionSegment checkpoint); a turn failing with exceededContextWindowSize (or the mid-turn budget error) compacts with a lowered target and retries ONCE before surfacing (caveat: retry re-runs tool calls; recording keeps both attempts). Summarizer preference flash > own model > deterministic pipeline. Explicit compact() remains for manual /compact binding upstairs.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,4 +1,25 @@
 ---
+comments:
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kya287hh57r24xyswk2smfgq
+  text: |-
+    Implementation landed:
+
+    - `RoutedModel.makeSession(instructions:workingDirectory:tools:budget:compactionPrompt:)` (RoutedLLM.swift) gains optional `budget: TokenBudget?` (default nil = opt-out) and `compactionPrompt: CompactionPrompt` (default `.default`), threaded through the internal shared builder into `makeRoutedSessionActor`.
+    - `RoutedSessionActor` gains `autoCompactionBudget`/`autoCompactionPrompt` stored properties, threaded through init, the `makeRoutedSessionActor` free function, and `fork(workingDirectory:)` (a fork inherits its parent's opt-in and fill state).
+    - `compact(prompt:budget:)` refactored: gate-acquire wrapper now delegates to a new private `fold(prompt:budget:summarizer:)` containing the actual mechanics (unchanged behavior ŌĆö always summarizes via own model).
+    - New private `performAutoCompaction(prompt:budget:)`: 3-tier summarizer cascade for auto-compaction only ŌĆö profile.flash's own model first (skipped if this session already is the flash slot), falling back to the session's own model on failure, falling back to the deterministic-only pipeline (`summarizer: nil`, which cannot throw) if that also fails. Calls `fold` directly (no gate acquisition ŌĆö already inside `runTurn`'s gate).
+    - `runTurn` now checks `contextFill >= budget.trigger` before each turn (proactive fold, emits `.compaction(_:)` via `onEvent`) and delegates to new `runTurnAttempt(...allowOverflowRetry:...)`, which retries **once** on `LanguageModelError.contextSizeExceeded` when a budget is set: records the failed attempt exactly as before (unchanged), folds harder (target halved, floored at 0.1) via `performAutoCompaction`, emits `.compaction(_:)`, then recurses with `allowOverflowRetry: false` and empty `pendingEvents` (already re-queued onto outbox by the failed attempt's own finish) ŌĆö guaranteeing at most one retry.
+    - `SessionEvent.swift` doc updated: `.compaction(_:)` is now actually emitted (was previously documented as reserved/never emitted, explicitly deferred to this task).
+
+    Tests: new `Tests/FoundationModelsRouterTests/AutoCompactionTests.swift`, 6 tests ŌĆö proactive fold preferring flash summarizer, fallback to own model when flash throws, opt-out (no budget) never auto-compacts, fork inherits budget + fires on its first turn from inherited fill, reactive retry-once success (with a real backend swap verified via replace-spy), reactive retry-once exhaustion (surfaces after exactly one failed retry, backend called exactly twice).
+
+    Note: tests were written after the implementation rather than strictly TDD-first, because this task required cross-cutting architectural research (serial-gate reentrancy, summarizer cascade design, retry/pendingEvents interaction) before a test-first API shape was obvious. Logged here per really-done's justification-required-if-deviating policy.
+
+    Verification: `swift build` clean, zero warnings. Full suite: 527 tests passing (504+18+5 across the three targets), up from the 521 baseline ŌĆö zero failures. Adversarial double-check agent dispatched to review the diff before handoff.
+
+    Left in `doing` per /implement contract ŌĆö not moved to review.
+  timestamp: 2026-07-24T12:40:22.833682+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KXTFTPY5BCXGN9MFXFFSJQHA
 - 01KXTFS4FNT1P5F889D1PEQ9N7

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -20,6 +20,22 @@

     Left in `doing` per /implement contract ŌĆö not moved to review.
   timestamp: 2026-07-24T12:40:22.833682+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kya2rxs59j6esbhwkp9mtdve
+  text: |-
+    Adversarial double-check round 1 (dispatched via double-check agent) found one real gap: `RoutedModel.makeGuidedSession(grammar:instructions:workingDirectory:)` in GuidedGeneration.swift never forwarded `budget`/`compactionPrompt` to the shared internal builder, so guided sessions could never opt into auto-compaction even though the builder's own doc comment claims to serve "both plain and guided session surfaces." It also flagged (non-blocking) that `SessionTreeRestoration.swift`'s `restoreSessionTree` never carries the opt-in forward into a restored session tree.
+
+    Fixed:
+    - `makeGuidedSession` now takes `budget: TokenBudget? = nil, compactionPrompt: CompactionPrompt = .default` and forwards them through the shared builder ŌĆö defaults preserve prior behavior exactly for existing callers.
+    - `restoreSessionTree`'s doc comment now explains restored nodes always get `nil`/`.default` (no persisted sidecar field to rehydrate from) and how to re-opt-in (manual `compact()` or a fresh fork). Doc-only change, no functional lines touched.
+    - Added `GuidedGenerationTests.guidedSessionForwardsAutoCompactionBudget` ŌĆö downcasts the vended session to `RoutedSessionActor` and asserts `autoCompactionBudget`/`autoCompactionPrompt` actually landed, closing the regression-coverage gap the second double-check pass called out as a non-blocking suggestion.
+
+    Round 2 double-check verdict: PASS (traced the full forwarding chain makeGuidedSession ŌåÆ makeSession(grammar:...) ŌåÆ makeRoutedSessionActor; confirmed no other silent call-site regression; confirmed the restoration diff is doc-only).
+
+    Final verification: `swift build` clean, zero warnings. Full suite: 528 tests passing (505+18+5), zero failures.
+
+    Task left in `doing` per /implement contract, ready for /review.
+  timestamp: 2026-07-24T12:49:29.893982+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KXTFTPY5BCXGN9MFXFFSJQHA
 - 01KXTFS4FNT1P5F889D1PEQ9N7
